name: Apple on Table
description: A medium apple (182 g) resting on a wooden table. The apple is ~84% water by mass, 11% sucrose (table sugar), and 5% glucose (fructose in apple flesh has the same formula C₆H₁₂O₆ as glucose). The wooden table surface is modeled as a carbohydrate matrix: glucose (as cellulose polysaccharide proxy, ~90%) and carbon (as lignin aromatic polymer proxy, ~10%). Thickness values are calibrated so thickness×density gives the correct apple/table mass ratio (0.182 kg vs 5.0 kg).

children.comment: Wooden table surface (~5 kg) — carbohydrate + lignin proxy
